config.scxml:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<scxml xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2005/07/scxml" xmlns:editor="http://vscxml.com/editor" version="1.0" datamodel="ecmascript" initial="off" name="HamiltonSTAR_Temperature">
  <datamodel>
    <data id="target_temp_01c" expr="0"/>
    <data id="current_temp_01c" expr="220"/>
    <data id="zone" expr="1"/>
    <data id="last_error" expr="0"/>
  </datamodel>
  <state id="off" editor:x="100" editor:y="150" editor:width="125" editor:height="75" editor:label="off" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="0">
    <transition target="heating" event="C0HI" editor:id="t_01KP3PX774HAGDBN77SNXDQ1M4">
      <assign location="target_temp_01c" expr="_event.data.hi || 0"/>
      <assign location="zone" expr="_event.data.hn || 1"/>
      <log expr="'Set temp (immediate)'" label="FW"/>
    </transition>
    <transition target="at_temperature" event="C0HC" editor:id="t_01KP3PX774PQWB9YRFNNDKSHTS">
      <assign location="target_temp_01c" expr="_event.data.hc || 0"/>
      <assign location="zone" expr="_event.data.hn || 1"/>
      <log expr="'Set temp (wait)'" label="FW"/>
    </transition>
    <transition target="off" event="C0RP" editor:id="t_01KP3PX774GKFWFDP8WEWD52QB">
      <log expr="'Query temp: ' + current_temp_01c" label="FW"/>
    </transition>
  </state>
  <state id="heating" editor:x="250" editor:y="150" editor:width="125" editor:height="75" editor:label="heating" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="1">
    <onentry>
      <log expr="'Heating to ' + target_temp_01c + ' (0.1C)'" label="FW"/>
    </onentry>
    <transition target="at_temperature" event="temp.reached" editor:id="t_01KP3PX775XXAGS4WR1SAVY0SB"/>
    <transition target="heating" event="C0HI" editor:id="t_01KP3PX775XVEH6J83CQYMM9RR">
      <assign location="target_temp_01c" expr="_event.data.hi || 0"/>
      <log expr="'Change target'" label="FW"/>
    </transition>
    <transition target="off" event="C0HF" editor:id="t_01KP3PX775YPX3GEY31QF55N8J">
      <assign location="target_temp_01c" expr="0"/>
      <log expr="'Temp off'" label="FW"/>
    </transition>
    <transition target="heating" event="C0RP" editor:id="t_01KP3PX7755H92QC6188Z34FRK">
      <log expr="'Query temp: ' + current_temp_01c" label="FW"/>
    </transition>
    <transition target="error_temp" event="temp.error" editor:id="t_01KP3PX775NQCCVEHD4EDJ4K42">
      <assign location="last_error" expr="19"/>
    </transition>
  </state>
  <state id="at_temperature" editor:x="400" editor:y="150" editor:width="175" editor:height="75" editor:label="at_temperature" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="2">
    <onentry>
      <assign location="current_temp_01c" expr="target_temp_01c"/>
      <log expr="'At target ' + target_temp_01c" label="FW"/>
    </onentry>
    <transition target="heating" event="C0HI" editor:id="t_01KP3PX775QRNK47HN11SPHF4C">
      <assign location="target_temp_01c" expr="_event.data.hi || 0"/>
    </transition>
    <transition target="at_temperature" event="C0HC" editor:id="t_01KP3PX7754BH6P2CFJCENN746">
      <assign location="target_temp_01c" expr="_event.data.hc || 0"/>
    </transition>
    <transition target="off" event="C0HF" editor:id="t_01KP3PX775963GM57AYEYH53C7">
      <assign location="target_temp_01c" expr="0"/>
      <log expr="'Temp off'" label="FW"/>
    </transition>
    <transition target="at_temperature" event="C0RP" editor:id="t_01KP3PX775AJYY3ZFYS2KXCG5Z">
      <log expr="'Query temp: ' + current_temp_01c" label="FW"/>
    </transition>
  </state>
  <state id="error_temp" editor:x="550" editor:y="150" editor:width="125" editor:height="75" editor:label="error_temp" editor:color="#2a2a3c" editor:zIndex="3">
    <onentry>
      <log expr="'Temp error ' + last_error" label="ERROR"/>
    </onentry>
    <transition target="off" event="C0HF" editor:id="t_01KP3PX775JSP6YFRZFG0JH9RQ">
      <assign location="last_error" expr="0"/>
    </transition>
  </state>
</scxml>
